title: Page view: /api/page + render Compiled Truth/Timeline/frontmatter
description:
Add GET /api/page?path=<rel> returning JSON { markdown, frontmatter, ... } for a page inside repo-wiki/. SANDBOX: resolve path within the wiki dir; reject traversal/absolute (../, /etc/..) with 400/403. Reuse parse_frontmatter.
Client: clicking a tree entry loads the page and renders it with vendored marked.js — a frontmatter table, the Compiled Truth section, and the Timeline section, styled with style.css.

Touches the server file + app.js (shared) -> depends on T1.

Test:
- curl /api/page?path=INDEX.md returns 200 + markdown+frontmatter
- curl /api/page?path=../../../../etc/passwd returns 400/403 (sandbox)
- page renders Compiled Truth + Timeline in browser (manual demoable)
notes: 2026-06-14 09:56 - [human] ADD in-page TOC/navigation: when rendering a page, generate a table-of-contents from its headings (## Compiled Truth, ## Timeline, and any sub-headings) as anchor links — e.g. a right-rail outline (collapses on narrow screens) or a compact outline above the content. Headings get id anchors; clicking scrolls to them; highlight the active section on scroll if cheap. This is the in-PAGE TOC; the sidebar tree (site nav across folders/pages) is the separate foundation already built in c04.
acceptance_criteria: Pages render (frontmatter + Compiled Truth + Timeline); path traversal is rejected (400/403)
closed_reason: Completed: /api/page (sandboxed, 400 on traversal) + page render (frontmatter table, Compiled Truth, Timeline via marked) + in-page TOC right-rail. Fixed parse_frontmatter block-list off-by-one.
